hooks.command: python3 "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/chat2skill_hook.py" user-prompt-submit || python "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/chat2skill_hook.py" user-prompt-submit || py -3 "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/chat2skill_hook.py" user-prompt-submit
python3 "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/chat2skill_hook.py" stop || python "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/chat2skill_hook.py" stop || py -3 "${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/chat2skill_hook.py" stop
